reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku cherry blossom spots; Akita-only call returns stone circles, ravines, museums and lakes — none related to sakura. Expected entities (Hirosaki, Kakunodate, Kitakami Tenshochi) absent. Schema fields are clean (qid, source_url, multilingual labels, heritage_designations) but content is off-topic.
missing_entities: 角館, 弘前公園, 三春滝桜, 北上展勝地
improvement_hint: Add intent extraction: detect 'sakura/cherry blossom' and filter by kinds=cherry_blossom_spot or boost spots with hanami designations; also broaden prefecture to all Tohoku (Aomori/Akita/Iwate/Fukushima).

reasoning: Query asks for Niigata sake breweries; response returns MAFF GI agricultural products (chamame, snow carrots, lotus root) — no sake breweries. Hakkaisan/Kubota/Koshi-no-Kanbai entirely absent. Schema/traceability is excellent but completely off-intent.
missing_entities: 八海山, 久保田, 越乃寒梅, sake brewery
improvement_hint: get_local_specialty should accept a sub-category 'sake' and route to MAFF GI sake/酒類 + Wikidata P31 sake brewery (Q1042400) entities, or add a dedicated get_breweries tool.

reasoning: Hakuba ski+onsen query: 白馬大池 present, but no ski resort (八方尾根/Goryu) and no onsen ryokan in this slice. Top hit is a municipal news article about UN Tourism Village award — schema-conformant but weak. Hakuba village hits and 白馬五竜高山植物園 are tangential.
missing_entities: 白馬八方尾根, 白馬五竜スキー場, Happo-One, onsen ryokan in Hakuba
improvement_hint: Add ski_resort and onsen kind filters; cross-link with hito_yu_kai or jalan onsen ryokan dataset for Hakuba area; demote municipal news pages from must_see tier.

reasoning: Kansai autumn foliage query: response is generic Kyoto landmarks (Nijo, Toji, Nishi Honganji, Ninnaji) — accurate but no autumn foliage signal. Tofukuji/Eikando/Arashiyama not visible in shown slice. Schema and traceability excellent but recall of canonical koyo spots low.
missing_entities: 東福寺, 永観堂, 嵐山
improvement_hint: Boost spots tagged with autumn_foliage / 紅葉 keyword in body_paragraphs or kinds; add seasonal_highlights field; broaden region to Kansai not just Kyoto.

reasoning: Mt. Yoshino correctly returned as the top result with prominence 1, multilingual labels, heritage designations. Other Nara temples included. Daigoji/Arashiyama/Tetsugaku-no-michi not present (not in Nara) but Yoshino satisfies the canonical recall.
missing_entities: 醍醐寺 (Kyoto), 嵐山 (Kyoto), 哲学の道 (Kyoto)
improvement_hint: Detect Kansai region intent and broaden cross-prefecture; tag sakura spots explicitly to support seasonal queries.

reasoning: Stargazing on Okinawan remote islands query: returns Naha-area heritage (Tamaudun, Shuri-jo, Nakagusuku, Sefa-utaki). Iriomote/Hateruma/Ishigaki dark-sky spots absent. Accurate Wikidata records but off-intent for stargazing/astrotourism.
missing_entities: 波照間島, 石垣島, 西表石垣国立公園 (dark-sky park), 八重山諸島
improvement_hint: Add stargazing/dark-sky keyword detection; surface 八重山/宮古 islands when query mentions 離島/星空; add astro_dark_sky_park kind.

reasoning: Hokkaido rural onsen ryokan: top hits are 日本秘湯を守る会 onsen ryokan (Shiriuchi, Ginkonyu, Ryounkaku, Yukomanso) — exactly the right hisoyu sub-source. Designation_jp/_en well populated. Coordinates often null which is a minor schema gap.
improvement_hint: Backfill coordinates and municipality on hito_yu_kai records via geocoding; demote ANA Holiday Inn (urban Sapporo) when query says rural.

reasoning: Setouchi islands query: Kagawa-only call returns Ritsurin, Mannō, Marugame, Takamatsu castles — Shikoku-side land attractions, no islands (Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima) shown in slice. Accurate, well-structured but misses the island-specific intent.
missing_entities: 直島, 小豆島, 豊島, 男木島, 女木島
improvement_hint: Add P31=Q23442 (island) filter when query mentions 'island/島'; broaden Setouchi region to include Okayama/Hiroshima/Ehime islands; tag art-island Naoshima with prominence boost.

reasoning: Tokushima indigo query: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (correct), Otani Ware (off-topic ceramics), Awa Washi (mentions indigo). Aizome workshops/aiyashiki not exposed. METI densan source attribution clean. see_also_wikidata_venues includes 大塚国際美術館 — irrelevant to indigo.
missing_entities: 藍住町歴史館 藍の館, 阿波藍体験 workshop venues
improvement_hint: Add aizome/indigo keyword filter and surface aiyashiki workshop venues from municipal_scrape; tighten see_also_wikidata_venues to category-relevant kinds (e.g., dye museums).

reasoning: Koyasan shukubo query: response is exactly koyasan_shukubo source with Annyo-in, Ichijo-in, Ekoin, Kitamuro-in, Kumagaiji — the canonical shukubo association members. Designation_jp/_en clean. Coordinates and name_en mostly null, mild schema gap.
improvement_hint: Add coordinates and name_en to koyasan_shukubo records; expose has_meditation/shojin_ryori boolean tags.

reasoning: search_area for 武家屋敷 returns Matsue Buke Yashiki, Echizen Uchiyama, Chiran (Kagoshima), Aizu — all canonical samurai districts outside Kyoto. Heritage labels (Important Preservation District) present. Last item (隅田八幡神社人物画像鏡, classified as Tokyo) is a heritage_class_match noise.
missing_entities: 金沢長町武家屋敷, 萩武家屋敷
wrong_data: 隅田八幡神社人物画像鏡 surfaced via heritage_class_match but is unrelated to 武家屋敷 and incorrectly tagged 東京都 (it is Wakayama).
improvement_hint: Tighten heritage_class_match recall to avoid mirror artifacts; add Kanazawa Nagamachi and Hagi samurai districts; verify prefecture on Wikidata join.

reasoning: Akita summer festivals: returns Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei — but Kanto Matsuri (the iconic Akita summer festival) is missing. national_heritage section leaks Hayachine Kagura (Iwate) which is not Akita. Indonesian translation usable.
missing_entities: 竿燈まつり (Kanto Matsuri), 西馬音内盆踊り
wrong_data: national_heritage section includes Hayachine Kagura (Iwate prefecture) under an Akita query — scope leak.
improvement_hint: Add Kanto Matsuri to bunka_intangible/festivals dataset; restrict national_heritage by prefecture_codes filter; expose date/season fields to support 'summer' intent.

reasoning: Sanin small fishing villages query: returns Iwami Ginzan (correct heritage), Matsue Castle, Gassantoda, Hamada Castle — castles dominate, no fishing village content (Mihonoseki/Sakaiminato/Hamada port). Well-structured but mismatched intent.
missing_entities: 美保関, 境港, 鞆ヶ浦 (Iwami fishing port)
improvement_hint: Add fishing_village/港町 keyword filter and surface kinds=fishing_port or municipal_scrape harbor pages; expose population_size to filter 'small'.

reasoning: Gifu washi query: Mino-yaki ranked first (off-topic ceramics), Hida Shunkei (lacquerware), Nagiso lathe — Mino washi (本美濃紙) which is the canonical washi for Gifu does not appear in shown slice (count=8 so it may be deeper). Workshop venues for paper-making not exposed.
missing_entities: 本美濃紙 (Hon-Minoshi), 美濃和紙の里会館
improvement_hint: Boost industry_category=和紙 records when category=craft + 'washi' keyword; add workshop_venue cross-link from municipal_scrape (Mino-shi paper museum).

reasoning: Noto fishing village query: returns Kanazawa Castle, Kenrokuen, National Crafts Museum, Nanao Castle — all Kanazawa city, no Noto Peninsula villages (Wajima, Suzu, Sosogi). Schema clean but completely missing the regional intent.
missing_entities: 輪島, 千枚田 (Shiroyone Senmaida), 珠洲, 曽々木
improvement_hint: Add municipality-level filter from query (能登半島→輪島市/珠洲市/穴水町); boost coastal/fishing_village kinds and Senmaida cultural landscape.

reasoning: search_area for 砂丘: 81 matches incl. 鳥取砂丘 and Hamaoka Sakyu (Shizuoka). Lesser-known dunes correctly surfaced. However, top results lean to municipal_scrape ad/listing pages with prefix descriptions; 'tier: notable/broader' for the canonical Tottori Sakyu page is undervalued. Some duplicated listing-style pages.
missing_entities: 中田島砂丘 (Nakatajima, Hamamatsu), 内灘砂丘

improvement_hint: Better dedupe municipal_scrape pages; correct municipality assignment on tottori-guide.jp pages; promote Wikidata sakyu entities (Q11602833 Tottori Sand Dunes) above municipal text blobs.

reasoning: Shimane traditional crafts (zh): Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, Unshu soroban, Izumo stone lantern — all correctly designated METI densan crafts. Chinese translations look coherent. Source URLs intact.
improvement_hint: Continue current pattern; consider exposing workshop venues for hands-on experience cross-linked from municipal_scrape.

reasoning: Hokkaido lavender query: response returns Matsumae Castle, Goryōkaku, Showa-shinzan, Sapporo Clock Tower — zero lavender fields. Furano Tomita Farm or Nakafurano lavender absent. Accurate entities but completely off-intent.

reasoning: Query (Tagalog) requests traditional towns/coffee in Kyushu but Oita-only results: Usa Jingu, Beppu Hells, Oka Castle, Beppu Tower. reasoning: Hokuriku kominka stay query: hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan (Nagai, Nishiyama) appropriate; but unnamed 'Student housing 1' (OSM noise) and AB Hotel ranked highly are not kominka. No specific kominka-stay sub-source. Schema partly broken (name=null on hostel).

reasoning: Kii Peninsula mountain shrine query via japan_heritage Wakayama: Wakanoura and Saigoku 33 Kannon pilgrimage stories returned. Kumano Sanzan / Koyasan stories not in visible slice (count=7 so likely deeper). Body_ja excellent provenance (文化庁).

reasoning: Niigata festivals: 129 events returned, including Nagaoka Fireworks (canonical Sea-of-Japan summer fireworks). However top items (魚沼芝桜まつり, ヒメサユリ祭り) are flower festivals before fireworks. Description not translated to en even though lang=en; municipality '新潟市' likely wrong on some non-Niigata-City events.

reasoning: Oita bamboo crafts: Beppu Bamboo Crafts (canonical) correctly designated METI traditional craft. Hakata Ori included because Oita is in production area — slightly off. see_also_wikidata_venues are general museums, not bamboo-specific.
improvement_hint: Down-rank cross-prefecture crafts (Hakata Ori) when primary prefecture differs; surface 別府市竹細工伝統産業会館 specifically as workshop venue.

reasoning: Shikoku cycling routes (Ehime) query: returns Uwajima, Matsuyama, Ozu castles and Uchikoza — heritage attractions, not cycling routes. Shimanami Kaido (the world-famous cycling route from Onomichi to Imabari) absent. Off-intent.

reasoning: Traditional kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto: get_traditional_arts surfaces Bunraku, Kabuki (UNESCO), Chakkirako, etc. Kabuki entry exists but no venue-level data (金丸座/コンピラ歌舞伎、内子座、永楽館). User intent is venues not the art form per se.
